verb לפשר

to mediate, reconcile; explain, clarify, give the meaning

verb להתפשר

to compromise

verb להפשיר

to defrost; defreeze; soften; thaw, melt; be defrosted; become lukewarm; soften

verb הופשר

be defrosted; melted

verb לפשר (>>פישר)

to mediate, reconcile

masculine noun

meaning
